use_cases: Selecting multiple items from a searchable dropdown list with keyboard navigation support
Building command palettes for quick action access in productivity applications
Filtering and selecting tags or categories in content management systems
Implementing searchable user or contact selection in forms
Creating product variant or attribute selectors in e-commerce interfaces
ai_summary: A searchable multiselect component built on Radix UI Dialog and cmdk primitives, featuring a command palette pattern with keyboard navigation. Combines a search input with selectable list items, styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, minimal appearance suitable for forms and filtering interfaces.
